## Summary

-

## Security impact

- [ ] No command execution, SSH, HITL, audit, telemetry, config, or redaction impact.
- [ ] Touches a security-sensitive path and includes focused tests.

## Checks

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make type`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make security`
- [ ] `make harness`
- [ ] `make verify-build`
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior changed.

## Notes

Mention migration impact, release-note wording, or intentionally skipped checks.
